ocr.text: In the context of American Tower's strategic real estate management, understanding the lease expiry schedule is critical for
anticipating revenue impacts and planning for future growth opportunities. The upcoming expirations of leases play a pivotal
role in the overall stability and performance of the portfolio. As illustrated in the accompanying table, the year 2023 highlights a
significant portion of our leases, with a total of 150 sites scheduled to expire, representing a lease value of approximately $25M.
This figure underscores the importance of proactive engagement with tenants to secure renewals and minimize potential
disruptions in cash flows. Looking ahead to 2024, we anticipate that 120 of our leases will reach their end, which could further
influence our revenue projections. The overall occupancy rate for these leases is currently at 85%, an encouraging metric that
reflects our strong tenant relationships and the desirability of our locations. However, it is imperative to strategize on retaining

this occupancy rate in subsequent years, particularly as the market dynamics evolve and new opportunities arise. 

Moreover, the
potential renewal of these leases will not only help maintain our revenue levels but also contribute to the overall growth of our
portfolio. The lease expiry schedule indicates that our total lease value is projected to increase, with a substantial portion of our
revenue contingent upon these renewals. In the context of the total portfolio, the projected occupancy for the next few years is
critical; we aim to sustain an occupancy rate above 80%, which is crucial for maintaining our competitive advantage in the
industry. The data presented clearly shows that effective management of lease expirations is essential, especially given that
approximately 70% of the leases expiring in 2024 will require immediate attention and strategic planning to ensure continuity
of cash flows.
LeaseExpirySchedule  TotalLeases
ExpiryYear  ActiveLeases
LeaseType  AverageDuration  RenewalRate(%)
Total  270  $60M  4.5Years  [HIDDEN]  2025  100
[HIDDEN]  6Years  75%  2026  80  $15M  [HIDDEN]
As we analyze the data further, it is noteworthy that the upcoming expirations from 2023 to 2024 are not merely statistics; they
represent key opportunities for negotiation and relationship-building with our tenants. Our proactive approach toward lease
management, including tenant outreach and market analysis, will be instrumental in achieving our target renewal rate. By
focusing on maintaining our current occupancy levels and enhancing tenant satisfaction, we can effectively mitigate the risks
associated with lease expirations. This diligence will ultimately contribute to the resilience of our revenue structure and support
American Tower's overarching goals in the real estate sector. In summary, the lease expiry schedule serves as a valuable tool for
forecasting our financial trajectory and reinforcing our commitment to operational excellence. The interplay of lease values,
occupancy rates, and strategic planning will shape our approach as we navigate through these critical periods of lease
expirations, ensuring that we remain well-positioned for future growth and stability.
